name: marketplace
description: Official AI Skills marketplace for Claude Code and Codex by aiskillstore. Contains security-audited SKILL.md-based agent skills organized by contributor. Includes JSON schema validation, package.json with ajv/gray-matter dependencies, and a pending/ directory for skills awaiting review.

findings_summary.notes: A marketplace aggregator for third-party skills rather than a single skill itself. Contains skills/ directory organized by contributor usernames (hundreds of directories), a pending/ directory for unapproved skills, schemas/ for validation, and scripts/fix-skill-names.js. Package.json uses ajv for JSON schema validation and gray-matter for SKILL.md frontmatter parsing. Described as 'security-audited' but no license file is present (legal ambiguity). The primary language listed as Ruby is puzzling given the codebase is TypeScript/JavaScript — this may be a GitHub language detection artifact. Concerns: (1) No license — all-rights-reserved by default. (2) The 'security-audited' claim cannot be verified without reviewing the actual audit process. (3) As a marketplace, the security quality of individual skills within it varies. (4) Installation method suggests Claude Code will fetch skills from GitHub directly ('Download all files from https://github.com/aiskillstore/marketplace/tree/main/skills/...'). The README's security analysis section describes what they check for but there is no transparency report or audit log visible in the repo. Users should independently verify skills fetched from this marketplace.
